v2.21.4 bundled Go 1.23.1 which can't parse go.mod requiring Go 1.26.
v2.24.0+ added Go 1.26 support.

Co-authored-by: seawiseinc <seawiseinc@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 7z VFS provider ignores configured exe path, fails on Windows

SevenZipVfsProvider.Initialize() only tried PATH candidates (7z/7za/7zz),
never the user-configured path from Options → Configuration.
On Windows, 7-Zip lives in C:\Program Files\7-Zip\ which is not on PATH,
so _exe stayed null and CanHandle returned false → "No VFS provider found".

- Add constructor parameter configuredPath to SevenZipVfsProvider
- Initialize() tries configuredPath first, then PATH, then the default
  Windows install location as a last resort
- Pass settings.SevenZipPath from AppSetup
- Improve EnsureInstalled() error message to mention the settings field

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Scanner v3: foto pipeline fixes, dual listings, gradient BG, 268 games DB

Phase 1 (Foto Pipeline):
- Back-pairing threshold 0.40→0.28 + partial productcode matching
- Image semaphore leak fix (try/finally pattern)
- compressImage: resize-first approach (2000→1400→1000px steps, then quality loop)
- Lightweight push protection (refuse push if no full-res available)
- Gradient-aware flood fill: follows gradual BG color changes (wooden desks, etc.)
- Quality gate: block auto-push for qualityScore < 25 (blurry photos)

Phase 2 (Scanner):
- Dual condition listings: GB/GBC/GBA/N64 cartridges auto-create "Redelijke staat" variant at 70% price
- Retry-After header parsing from Anthropic 429/503 responses + exponential backoff
- Parallel scanners: mobile 10, desktop 14 (was 6/10)
- Image semaphore: mobile 15, desktop 20 (was 10/15)
- Game database expanded: 180→268 entries (GB/GBC/GBA/DS/3DS/N64/Switch/Wii)
- scan-product route: unified with SYSTEM_PROMPT + dynamic context only

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs(auth): implementation plan — 7 phase tickets for access redesign [#1020]

Self-contained phase plans with BDD acceptance criteria, file maps,
and context references so any agent can pick up and implement.

Phase 1: Entity restructuring + entitlements (foundation)
Phase 2: Plans + limits + billing foundations
Phase 3: Overrides + advanced limits
Phase 4: Versioning + grandfathering
Phase 5: Billing integration (Stripe)
Phase 6: Cloud storage + data residency
Phase 7: Client-side + UI components

Also moves local-phase-workflow, bdd-acceptance-criteria, and
ticket-system rules from backstage to vertz repo.

refactor: restructure Application layer to mirror Domain DDD bounded contexts

- Rename Accounts → Identity (mirrors Domain.Identity)
- Merge Roles + Permissions → AccessControl (mirrors Domain.AccessControl)
- Rename Tokens → TokenManagement (mirrors Domain.TokenManagement)
- Move AssignRoleToUser command to Identity context (mutates Account aggregate)
- Move AuditAI concrete implementations to Infrastructure/AI/V3/
- Add missing V3 implementations: AgenticRAGService, MultiHopRetriever, ConfidenceScorer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: external editor/viewer launch broken on Windows (used /bin/sh)

LaunchExternalProgram was routing through ProcessHelper.RunDetached
which calls /bin/sh -c "..." — doesn't exist on Windows, fails silently.

Rewrite to use ProcessHelper.TryLaunchArgs (direct ProcessStartInfo) which
works on both platforms. Also handles:
- Quoted paths: "C:\Program Files\prog.exe" flags
- Absolute paths with spaces: treated as single executable (no quoting needed)
- Commands with flags: code --wait, gedit --new-window
- Error dialog if the launch fails instead of silent failure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix SGDataClient api_key passed as positional arg (base_url)

SGDataClient(api_key) was setting base_url to the API key string,
causing all requests to fail silently and HDB lot counts to return 0.
Fixed by using the keyword argument: SGDataClient(api_key=api_key).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix infinite loop on homepage section image upload

Root cause: "Join NewBee" and "Training With Us" sections had ~1MB
base64 data URLs stored in the database. When editing any section,
the entire base64 string was sent back in the PUT request payload,
causing timeouts and browser hangs.

Fixes:
- Only send image_url in update payload when it actually changed
  (new file uploaded, image removed, or URL manually edited)
- Migrated existing base64 image URLs to S3 in production DB

docs: Linux の実行コマンドを xvfb + opengl3 に更新

CI での動作確認の結果、headless + vulkan は dummy レンダラーに
フォールバックすることが判明。実際に動作した xvfb-run + opengl3
の組み合わせにドキュメントを合わせる。

- README.md: 使い方・アーキテクチャ図の vulkan → opengl3
- tests/README.md: Linux の実行手順を追加

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JHqiafsF5Do2riJ1oNo2Mz (#7)

* ci: CI上でスクリーンショットを自動生成するように対応

- capture.gd: キャプチャ前に既存の出力ディレクトリのPNGを全削除する _clear_output_dir() を追加
- CI: 最新Godotをダウンロードし、headlessモードでスクリーンショットを生成するステップを追加
- .gitignore: tests/vr_screenshots/ をIgnoreに追加（CI生成物はgit管理不要）
- tests/vr_screenshots/: コミット済みスクリーンショットを削除（CIで毎回生成するため不要）

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JHqiafsF5Do2riJ1oNo2Mz

* fix(ci): --headless を --display-driver headless に変更してVulkanレンダリングを有効化

--headless は内部で --rendering-driver dummy を強制するため、
SubViewport のテクスチャ取得が失敗していた。
--display-driver headless に変更することでレンダリングドライバの
指定が有効になり、Vulkanでの実レンダリングが可能になる。

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JHqiafsF5Do2riJ1oNo2Mz

* fix(ci): xvfb + OpenGL3 に切り替えてスクリーンショット取得を修正

headless display server + Vulkan の組み合わせはCI環境でVulkanの
初期化に失敗してdummyレンダラーにフォールバックしていた。
xvfb-run で仮想X11ディスプレイを用意し、Mesa ソフトウェア
レンダリング (opengl3) を使うことで実際のレンダリングが可能になる。

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JHqiafsF5Do2riJ1oNo2Mz

* docs: Linux の実行コマンドを xvfb + opengl3 に更新

CI での動作確認の結果、headless + vulkan は dummy レンダラーに
フォールバックすることが判明。実際に動作した xvfb-run + opengl3
の組み合わせにドキュメントを合わせる。

- README.md: 使い方・アーキテクチャ図の vulkan → opengl3
- tests/README.md: Linux の実行手順を追加

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JHqiafsF5Do2riJ1oNo2Mz

---------

commit.message:
fix(mcp): add PID file management for stale instance recovery (#59)

When the MCP server crashes or is killed without clean shutdown, the
next startup attempt can fail due to stale state. Add PID file
management to detect and clean up stale instances automatically.

- Write PID to ~/.ouroboros/mcp-server.pid on startup
- Clean up PID file on shutdown (via try/finally)
- Detect stale PIDs on startup using os.kill(pid, 0)
- Add actionable recovery steps in error messages

Closes #59

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix resource update conflicts with retry on conflict

The createOrUpdate method reads an existing resource then updates it,
but another reconcile loop may modify the resource between the read
and write. Add a single retry on conflict: re-fetch the resource
version and retry the update.

Applied to both core and REST reconcilers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Fabien Dupont <fabiendupont@pm.me>

commit.message:
fix: add video compression for IM platforms and CJK font fallback for containers

1. Add --max-size flag to render-mv.sh for automatic video compression
   using ffmpeg two-pass encoding when output exceeds the size limit.
   Useful for IM platforms (WhatsApp ≤16MB, Discord ≤25MB, Telegram ≤50MB).

2. Add CJK font detection and auto-install for Linux container environments.
   Detects missing fonts via fc-list and attempts to install fonts-noto-cjk
   (apt/apk/dnf) before rendering. Falls back with manual install instructions.

3. Expand font-family fallback chain in AudioVisualization.tsx to cover
   more CJK fonts commonly available in container/Linux environments
   (WenQuanYi, Droid Sans Fallback, Source Han Sans, etc.).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
JP FAQ style guide compliance, metrics constants, presentation link

- Fix 7 keigo/katakana violations in FAQ JP copy (エンゲージメント→プロジェクト,
  コミットする→決める, remove お/ご honorifics, simplify ご用意しています→あります)
- Extract live metrics to constants.ts per content spec requirement
- Add /presentation link to footer navigation (EN + JP)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
